+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metal3-io: Publish release artifacts with manifests",
+    "description": "Publish release artifacts with manifests. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify metal3-io troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your metal3-io deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metal3-io configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metal3-io configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl get configmap -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metal3-io\n```\n**What steps did you take and what happened:**\n\nAs seen in https://github.com/metal3-io/metal3-docs/pull/414 we are not setting the image tag in the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Publish release artifacts with manifests",
+        "description": "✨ \n\nThis PR solves image tags, by adding a verification check and also setting the tag automatically \n\n**Which issue(s) this PR fixes\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Publish release artifacts with manifests is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n metal3-io --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "✨ \n\nThis PR solves image tags, by adding a verification check and also setting the tag automatically \n\n**Which issue(s) this PR fixes",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
